function solve(grid, x, y, k) {
    // Create a deep copy of the grid
    const newGrid = grid.map(row => [...row]);
    
    // Extract the submatrix
    const submatrix = [];
    for (let i = 0; i < k; i++) {
        const row = newGrid[x + i].slice(y, y + k);
        submatrix.push(row);
    }

    submatrix.reverse();
    
    // Replace the rows in newGrid
    for (let i = 0; i < k; i++) {
        const originalRow = newGrid[x + i];
        const reversedRow = submatrix[i];
        for (let j = 0; j < k; j++) {
            originalRow[y + j] = reversedRow[j];
        }
    }
    
    return newGrid;
}
